title: MC: PS4 Edition
description: Wish you could still play legacy on your PS4 with modern minecraft? Well here it is!
body:
Wish you could still play legacy with the newest updates? Well, here it is!

Using legacy 4J, the game feels like its straight off your PS4! with gamma, controller support and more to come!

This modpack is a successor to Java: Legacy Edition.

**_WARNING! LEGACY 4J CAN BE SEEN AS A HACK BY ANTICHEAT! USE IN SERVERS WITH CAUTION!_**



thanks to fabulously optimized for the base to the modpack!
